instruction: Create a Lock Screen widget for iOS26 that displays the user's daily step count using WidgetKit and App Intents.
Refactor a watchOS ObservableObject-based timer model to use the @Observable macro.
Create a visionOS immersive space that displays a rotating Earth model in 3D.
Create a macOS26 menu bar extra using SwiftUI that shows the current Wi-Fi network name.
Create a WidgetKit widget for tvOS26 that displays the currently playing show using App Intents.
